description_long: This house features a rectangular floor plan with a spacious open living area, visible through large front-facing windows and a balcony with railings. The interior includes multiple rooms, such as a living room with a sofa, a dining area, and what appears to be a study or library with bookshelves. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of brown and beige, and the front facade is characterized by wide glass doors and a balcony railing. The roof is flat, and the house is single-storied, with a modern, minimalist architectural style. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more private. The main entryway is set back behind the balcony, featuring a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a balcony with railings. The exterior is white with brown and beige accents, and the interior is open and spacious with multiple rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass doors, a balcony with railings, and a glimpse into the open living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a more private facade with fewer windows, a visible sofa, and a small patio area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a bookshelf, a large window with curtains, and a simple exterior door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dining area, additional windows, and a secondary entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller private windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door behind a balcony, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
